notes: Axle capacity @ ground ≠ vehicle Max Std FGAWR for a given spring package.
Do not treat 7000 lb axle capacity as the vehicle's assigned FGAWR.
Must not be inherited as F-450 silo architecture.

honesty_notes: Operator phrasing 'non-driven drop-forged steel solid beam' is directionally consistent with OEM 'Monobeam' / 'Forged Steel' but must use OEM vocabulary (Monobeam) going forward.
4x2 Monobeam is non-driving relative to 4x4 live monobeam — do not import 4x4 live-spindle geometry.
Radius-arm count/material on 4x2 table row is layout-truncated in text extract; treat radius-arm detail as DOCUMENT_SUPPORTED existence + CANDIDATE detail pending clearer token or WSM/parts.

notes: Already locked in chassis frame brief DT-D051; re-affirmed for Mission D.
Marketing label; dimensional authority remains front_track_I=74.8 from SRC-CAND-000010.

operator_claim_standard_5600_lbs.reason: For Reg Cab 4x2 145.3 F-450, Max Std Front GAWR is 4800 (6.8L) or 5200 (6.7L), not 5600. 5600 appears in Available Front GAWR upgrade columns (Heavy-/Extra Heavy-Service paths), not as the universal baseline.

packages_named_in_sources: Extra Heavy Duty Front End Suspension

token_anchor.section: Available Front GAWR — F-450 Chassis Cabs

brochure_corroboration.claim: Extra-Heavy-Duty Front-End Suspension Package (F-450/F-550): upgraded front axle and 7,500-lb front springs/GAWR rating

notes: Physical vehicle FGAWR requires door-jamb / certification label intake — still unverified on VEH-000001.
Do not invent spring codes for the bare reference until label or order sheet is acquired.
